11.description: Added doc = false to [[bin]] in motif_debug_cli/Cargo.toml. Issue #11 closed by maintainer (completed).

12.description: Added .github/workflows/release.yml (validate→draft-release→publish pipeline) and extended scripts/release.sh with bump <version> subcommand. Push failed — issue #23 created with patch artifact. Maintainer can apply manually from run 22656017116 artifacts.

workspace_deps.description: Populated [workspace.dependencies] with shared external + internal crates; all 5 workspace members migrated to workspace = true; motif_test migrated to workspace package metadata.

contributing_docs.description: Added CONTRIBUTING.md with prerequisites, project layout, building, testing (TDD philosophy), code style, debug CLI, spool, and PR submission guide.

checkbox_element.description: Implemented Checkbox element in motif_core/src/elements/checkbox.rs with builder API, hit testing, checked/unchecked quads, hover/press visual state, and 9 unit tests. Resolves p3 TODO 'Checkbox element' from spool elements stream.

text_input_element.description: Implemented TextInput element in motif_core/src/elements/text_input.rs with builder API, placeholder, focused/unfocused border, cursor rendering, UTF-8 cursor snapping, and 10 unit tests. Resolves p2 TODO 'Text input element' from spool elements stream.

todomvc_example.description: Implemented TodoMVC example in crates/motif/examples/todomvc.rs (~700 lines). Text input, checkbox toggle, hover-reveal delete, All/Active/Completed filter tabs, items-remaining count, clear-completed button. Resolves p1/p2 TODOs from spool todomvc stream.

element_list_debug.description: Added element.list debug command: flat HitTree dump (id, bounds, z_index). Adds update_hit_tree() to DebugServer, HitEntryInfo to snapshot.rs, CLI formatter. Stepping stone toward 'Query element tree (p1)' devtools TODO.

hot_render_boundary.description: Added motif::hot module with RenderFn type alias, hot::call(), and hot::connect(). Documents stable boundary contract (what is safe to change between hot patches). Updates hot.rs example to use new API. Resolves p1 spool task 'Design hot-reloadable render function boundary'.

metal_alignment_docs.description: Added module-level doc comment to metal/mod.rs explaining the float3 16-byte alignment gotcha (table: float/float2/float3/float4 sizes vs alignments), safe design rule, improved _padding field docs, and compile-time const assertions for QuadInstance (112 B) and GlyphInstance (48 B). Resolves p3 spool task 'Document Metal struct alignment gotcha'.

keyboard_simulation.description: Added key_down/key_up/key_press functions to input_sim.rs using macOS CGEvent keyboard API + non-macOS stubs. Added server dispatch (input.key_down/up/press). CLI key-name lookup table (letters a-z, digits, arrows, F-keys, modifiers, special keys) + parse_input_key + format_input_key + 18 new tests. Resolves p2 spool task 'Simulate keyboard events'.

inject_debug_text.description: Added OverlayText struct to snapshot.rs; DebugOverlays gains texts Vec with shared next_id counter; remove/clear work on both kinds; DebugServer::overlay_texts(); debug.draw_text dispatch; debug.list returns unified kind-tagged array; draw.text CLI command with space-safe content parsing; format_debug_list shows Quads+Texts tables; 10 new integration tests. Resolves p2 spool task 'Inject debug text'.

dep_audit.notes: Ran cargo metadata on Linux. All 5 workspace packages resolve correctly. [workspace.dependencies] is empty (PR #16 addresses). Individual crates use reasonable semver pins. Could not run cargo outdated (macOS required for full Metal build). Feature branches (feature/devtools, feature/focus-system, feature/hot-reload, feature/input-system, feature/quad-borders) exist on GitHub but predate current main.

devtools_investigation.findings: scene.quads, scene.text_runs, input.state, debug.draw_quad, debug.clear, screenshot all already implemented in server.rs. 'Query element tree (p1)' TODO is NOT fully implemented. PR #21 adds element.list (flat HitTree dump: id, bounds, z_index). Full element tree query still needs: parent-child tracking in DrawContext, component type names in HitEntry. Could implement 'element.inspect <id>' in a future run once #21 lands.

2026-03-04.pr16: pending (0 checks - CI did not run on Repo Assist draft PR branches)
2026-03-04.pr20: pending (0 checks - CI did not run on Repo Assist draft PR branches)
2026-03-04.notes: CI requires macOS for clippy/test. fmt and doc run on ubuntu-latest. No CI runs found for any of PRs #16-#22 in pull_request event workflow runs. This may be because draft PRs from github-actions bot do not trigger workflows. Will monitor on 2026-03-18 nudge date.

focus_module_findings.findings: focus.rs already has FocusId (atomic counter), FocusHandle (Arc-based), FocusEvent (Focus/Blur), FocusState (tracks current focus + pending events) with comprehensive tests. accessibility.rs has FocusManager (tab order navigation). What is missing: (1) DrawContext integration so elements can call ctx.focus_handle() to claim focus, (2) InputState routing keyboard events to focused element. This is a good multi-file change for a future run once the element PRs (#18, #19) merge.

notes: Run 14 (22663571765): Task 10 — implemented inject debug text PR (branch repo-assist/improve-inject-debug-text, expected PR #26). OverlayText struct; shared ID counter with quads; debug.draw_text server method; draw.text CLI command; 10 new integration tests. Resolves p2 spool task 'Inject debug text'. Build fails on Linux due to missing fontconfig (same infrastructure issue as all prior PRs). Task 11 — updated Monthly Activity Summary. Next priorities: (a) On 2026-03-18 nudge PRs if not reviewed. (b) Focus management integration into DrawContext (good for after #18/#19 merge). (c) Screenshot diffing utility (p2 devtools TODO) — good next devtools feature. (d) element.inspect <id> after #21 merges. (e) Cursor management (p3 input TODO). (f) Release workflow retry if maintainer prefers not to apply patch manually.
